Step-by-Step MIVAN Shuttering Procedure Guide (Execution Point of View)
Welcome to our comprehensive guide on the MIVAN shuttering procedure
MIVAN is a cutting-edge formwork system used in construction, renowned for its efficiency and durability. 
In this video, we'll walk you through the entire process, from start to finish, to help you gain a solid understanding of how to use MIVAN formwork effectively.

Our expert team will break down each step, providing valuable insights, tips, and best practices along the way. Whether you're a seasoned professional looking to refine your skills or a newcomer to MIVAN construction, this tutorial is designed to cater to all levels of expertise.
Timestamps
02:44 Ground Survey
12:35 Setting out MIVAN at site
15:26 MIVAN grid line drawing reading
18:36 Vertical Rebar fixing work
19:23 Formwork erection work at site
Slab reinforcement work
22:51 External side wall erection work
24:32 Checking of MIVAN shuttering
1. Grid line checking
2. Soffit level checking
3. Wall verticality checking 
4. Outer kicker line checking
33:29 Deviation in kicker level
35:44 MEP work of slab
1. Switch boxes fixing on panels
2. Plumbing Grooves fixing work
3. Sleeves and cutout fixing
4. Slab electric work
38:22 concrete of MIVAN slab
41:47 Post concrete activity
42:41 Issues post concreting survey
45:33 Deshuttering of MIVAN panels
47:12 Installation of Brackets
47:45 wall ties hole filling work
48:11 Building level checking wrt BM
